findings.title: 4 of 7 task-specified test files never created
findings.issue: Missing: github-metrics.test.ts (4 test cases), queue/types.test.ts (1 test case), refresh-skills/route.test.ts (6 test cases), dedup-skills/route.test.ts (7 test cases). 14 of 19 ACs have zero dedicated test coverage.
findings.suggestion: Create all 4 missing test files with the test cases specified in tasks.md
findings.impact: TDD mode violated. 14/19 ACs untested. Regressions undetectable.

findings.title: Existing test files missing increment-specific test cases
findings.issue: submission-store.test.ts has no mock of github-metrics, no star fetch tests (T-004), no slug field assertions (T-002). enrichment.test.ts has no shard dispatch tests (T-008). search-index.test.ts has no buildSearchEntry tests (T-006).
findings.suggestion: Add the missing test cases from tasks T-002, T-004, T-006, T-008 to existing test files
findings.impact: Core increment functionality (star fetch at publish, shard dispatch in enrichment) has zero test coverage.

findings.title: Deprecated skills not removed from search index during enrichment
findings.issue: When enrichment deprecates a skill (repo 404), updates.isDeprecated=true is set but no 'remove' shard dispatch is made. Deprecated skills remain in search results until full rebuild.
findings.suggestion: Add 'remove' shard dispatch when updates.isDeprecated && opts.searchKv
findings.impact: Deprecated skills visible in search for up to 10 minutes after deprecation.

findings.title: Search shard entry uses raw repoUrl instead of normalized
findings.issue: publishSkill shard dispatch uses sub.repoUrl (raw) while DB upsert uses normalizeRepoUrl(sub.repoUrl). Creates URL mismatch between DB and search index.
findings.suggestion: Use normalizeRepoUrl(sub.repoUrl) ?? sub.repoUrl in the shard entry
findings.impact: Search index entries may not match DB records, breaking dedup and admin tools.

findings.title: forceForks not sanitized like forceStars
findings.issue: forceStars gets Math.max(0, Math.floor()) sanitization but forceForks is written directly to DB unsanitized.
findings.suggestion: Apply same Math.max(0, Math.floor()) to forceForks
findings.impact: Admin could accidentally write negative or fractional fork counts to DB.

findings.title: skillNames array type not validated at runtime
findings.issue: skillNames from request.json() is not validated as array. String input would cause Prisma runtime error.

findings.title: Sequential GitHub fetches in refresh-skills could timeout
findings.issue: Sequential fetches with 8s timeout each. Many unique repos could exceed Worker CPU time limit.
findings.suggestion: Use batched Promise.allSettled with concurrency limit
findings.impact: Admin endpoint may timeout on large skill sets.

findings.title: Dedup endpoint N+1 query pattern
findings.issue: One query per group + one update per loser. Could timeout on large datasets.
findings.suggestion: Batch updates with updateMany or add take limit on dupGroups
findings.impact: Admin endpoint may timeout with many duplicate groups.
